metadata.description: Multi-engine 3-stage code review pipeline — auto-routes backend→Codex, frontend→Gemini, with auto-fix loop

plugins.name: agent-review-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-engine 3-stage code review pipeline (correctness + impact + adversarial). Auto-routes backend files to Codex, frontend to Gemini, mixed changes to both in parallel. Auto-fix loop until PASS.
